    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    G

    getCapacityL() - Method in class compulsory.Harta
    Obtine capacitatea maxima de locatii.
    getCapacityR() - Method in class compulsory.Harta
    Obtine capacitatea maxima de drumuri.
    getCntL() - Method in class compulsory.Harta
    Obtine numarul curent de locatii adaugate pe harta.
    getCntR() - Method in class compulsory.Harta
    Obtine numarul curent de drumuri adaugate pe harta.
    getLength() - Method in class compulsory.Road
    Obtine lungimea drumului.
    getLoc() - Method in class compulsory.Harta
    Obtine array-ul de locatii de pe harta.
    getLoc1() - Method in class compulsory.Road
    Obtine prima locatie (capatul 1) a drumului.
    getLoc2() - Method in class compulsory.Road
    Obtine a doua locatie (capatul 2) a drumului.
    getName() - Method in class compulsory.Location
    Obtine numele locatiei.
    getRoads() - Method in class compulsory.Harta
    Obtine array-ul de drumuri de pe harta.
    getSpeed() - Method in class compulsory.Road
    Obtine limita de viteza a drumului.
    getType() - Method in class compulsory.Location
    Obtine tipul locatiei.
    getType() - Method in class compulsory.Road
    Obtine tipul drumului.
    getX() - Method in class compulsory.Location
    Obtine coordonata X a locatiei.
    getY() - Method in class compulsory.Location
    Obtine coordonata Y a locatiei.
